items.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
items.description: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. items.title: Spotify will let you fine-tune your weekly Release Radar playlist
